news.title: Meta enters the crowded AI coding battle with Muse Spark 1.1
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Meta's pitch to users is Spark's ability to handle large agentic workloads, fix bugs, and help with large code migrations — the kind of automation that enterprises are increasingly turning to AI companies to provide.

news.title: New York Times says OpenAI hid evidence in ChatGPT copyright trial
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] News publishers say OpenAI hid tools and datasets that could identify copyrighted journalism in ChatGPT outputs, escalating their lawsuit with a new motion for sanctions.

news.title: Google will now disclose which ads are made with AI
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] While Google prohibits misleading and deceptive ads, an ad can still leverage AI to create some type of synthetic or digitally altered content. Until now, that's something Google only required election ads to disclose.

news.title: Paris-based AI voice startup Gradium raises $100M seed, backed by Nvidia
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] The company is using the cash to open an office in the Bay Area and compete for talent there, "strengthening its position at the heart of the world's leading AI ecosystem."

news.title: How did the government decide OpenAI’s frontier model was safe to release?
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] "Exactly what that dialog looked like between the government and Anthropic and OpenAI is unclear."

news.title: Instagram users: Here’s how to stop Meta’s AI from using your photos
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Muse Image allows users to generate AI images using photos from public Instagram accounts. As long as a person's profile is public, another user can tag that account and use their images as part of an AI-generated creation.

news.title: Air Force sergeant promotion errors: 'No AI products used, result of human error,' says Air Force service after 135 airmen lose promotions
news.description: [THE ECONOMIC TIMES] Air Force sergeant promotion errors: Over 100 US Air Force personnel lost promotions due to a scoring error. An outdated answer key mistakenly graded exams for Security Forces staff sergeants. This error caused 135 promotions to be revoked after a...

news.title: Recruiters shift focus to specialised AI jobs to stay relevant
news.description: [THE STAR] Recruitment companies, facing the threat of artificial intelligence tools replacing human labour and customers embracing AI-assisted applicant screening, are adapting by honing in on niche, in-demand jobs in the AI economy.

news.title: Eric Trump’s Bitcoin bet erases $600 million from family fortune

news.title: Canada’s Revamped R&D Tax Credit Comes With Questions About AI
news.description: [BLOOMBERG TAX NEWS] Canada’s expansion of a flagship research and development tax credit is winning the program new adherents, even as the growing role of artificial intelligence raises confusion about project eligibility.

news.title: "Real-Time Conversation Is Here": OpenAI Unveils Voice AI 'GPT-Live'
news.description: [INVENGLOBAL] OpenAI has unveiled its next-generation voice model, GPT-Live. Designed to enable natural, human-like interaction, GPT-Live serves as a new foundation model that replaces the existing ChatGPT voice functionality.
